lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- My Family and Friends -- Possessives and have / has
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carolina Paludetto Rodrigues | Aula 10 -- My Family and Friends

listenings.text: Welcome, everyone, to the Rodrigues family reunion. Every year our whole family meets at my grandparents house in the countryside, and it is my favorite day of the year. My parents always arrive early to help with the food. My aunt and my uncle bring my two cousins, and they have new stories to tell every time. Our old neighbor comes too, because he is like a relative now. My grandmother has a big garden full of flowers, and my grandfather has an old guitar that he loves to play. After lunch, every relative sits together and we look at old photos. My sister has her camera, and she takes a picture of the whole family. A family is not only your parents and your siblings. It is everyone who loves you. So come in, find your cousins, and enjoy the day.

Hi, this is Carolina, and I want to tell you about my family and my friends. I have a small but very happy family. My mother is a teacher and my father works in a hospital. I have one younger brother, and his name is Theo. He is ten years old, and he has a funny little dog. My grandparents live near us, so I see them every weekend. My grandmother has the best recipes, and her cakes are amazing. I also have many friends at my school, Saint Louis. My best friend is Marina, and her family is very kind to me. On Sundays our two families have lunch together. I am very lucky, because my family and my friends always support me. That is my world, and I love it.

extra_audio.text: Carolina has a big family reunion every year. First, her parents arrive early to cook the food. Then her aunt and her uncle bring her two cousins. After that, the whole family eats lunch together. Finally, her sister takes a photo of everyone.
